import React from "react"; import { NavLink } from "react-router-dom"; const mainLinks = [ { to: "/", label: "Dashboard", icon: "bi-grid-1x2-fill", end: true }, { to: "/prospectos", label: "Prospectos", icon: "bi-people-fill" }, { to: "/ventas", label: "Ventas", icon: "bi-cart-check-fill" }, { to: "/seguros", label: "Seguros", icon: "bi-shield-check" }, { to: "/vehiculos", label: "Vehículos", icon: "bi-truck-front-fill" }, { to: "/vendedores", label: "Vendedores", icon: "bi-person-badge-fill" }, { to: "/automatizaciones", label: "Automatizaciones", icon: "bi-lightning-charge-fill" }, ]; const analysisLinks = [ { to: "/reportes", label: "Reportes", icon: "bi-bar-chart-fill" }, { to: "/rendimiento", label: "Rendimiento", icon: "bi-graph-up-arrow" }, { to: "/configuracion", label: "Configuración", icon: "bi-gear-fill" }, ]; export default function Sidebar() { return (
